methods.description: Collection of coal samples from a surface mine for analysis.

steps.description: Samples were collected as benches/lithotypes from the full thickness of the mined coal.
steps.searchable_summary: collect coal samples from surface mine

methods.description: Analysis of coal samples to determine moisture, volatile matter, ash content, sulfur forms, and heating value.

steps.description: Proximate analysis was performed following ASTM Standards D3173-11, D3175-11, and D3174-11.
steps.searchable_summary: perform proximate analysis using ASTM standards

steps.description: Total sulfur and forms of sulfur were determined following ASTM Standards D3177-02 and D2492-02.
steps.searchable_summary: determine sulfur content using ASTM standards

steps.description: Ultimate analysis and heating value determinations were performed based on ASTM Standards D3176-15 and D5865-13.
steps.searchable_summary: perform ultimate analysis and heating value determination

methods.description: Determination of trace elements in coal samples using ICP-MS and other techniques.

steps.description: Oxides of major elements were determined on a Philips PW2404 X-ray Spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: determine major element oxides using X-ray spectrometer

steps.description: Trace elements were determined using ICP-MS in pulse counting mode.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze trace elements using ICP-MS

steps.description: Samples were digested using an UltraClave Microwave High Pressure Reactor.
steps.searchable_summary: digest samples using microwave high pressure reactor

steps.description: Arsenic and Se were determined by ICP-MS using collision cell technology.
steps.searchable_summary: determine arsenic and selenium using ICP-MS with CCT

steps.description: Mercury was determined using a Milestone DMA-80 analyzer.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze mercury using DMA-80 analyzer

methods.description: Analysis of mineral compositions in coal samples using XRD and SEM-EDS.

steps.description: Mineral compositions were determined by X-ray powder diffraction (XRD) of low-temperature ashes.
steps.searchable_summary: determine mineral compositions using XRD

steps.description: Low-temperature ashing was carried out using an EMITECH K1050X plasma asher.
steps.searchable_summary: perform low-temperature ashing using plasma asher

steps.description: XRD analysis was performed on a D/max-2500/PC powder diffractometer.
steps.searchable_summary: perform XRD analysis on diffractometer

steps.description: Quantitative mineralogical analysis using Siroquant software.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze XRD patterns using Siroquant software

methods.description: Petrological analysis and maceral identification in coal samples.

steps.description: Petrology was determined on epoxy-bound particulate pellets prepared to a final 0.05-µm alumina polish.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare and polish particulate pellets for petrology

steps.description: Vitrinite reflectance was measured with polarized light and a photomultiplier.
steps.searchable_summary: measure vitrinite reflectance using polarized light

steps.description: Maceral identification was based on nomenclature from the International Committee for Coal and Organic Petrology.
steps.searchable_summary: identify macerals using ICCP nomenclature

methods.description: Liberation and analysis of palynomorphs from coal samples.

steps.description: Palynomorphs were liberated by oxidizing coal with Schulze's Solution.
steps.searchable_summary: liberate palynomorphs using Schulze's Solution

steps.description: Samples were digested with 5% potassium hydroxide and washed with distilled water.
steps.searchable_summary: digest and wash samples with KOH and water

steps.description: Amorphous organic matter was removed using ethylene glycol monoethyl ether and ultrasonic vibration.
steps.searchable_summary: remove AOM using ethylene glycol and ultrasound

steps.description: Samples were strew-mounted onto cover glasses and fixed to microscope slides.
steps.searchable_summary: mount samples on slides for microscopy

steps.description: Spore and pollen abundances are based on a count of 250 palynomorphs for each sample.
steps.searchable_summary: count palynomorphs to determine spore and pollen abundance
